sources.title: Obsession (restored) (1949, film-noir, imdb score: 7.4)
sources.description: Obsession , released in the USA as The Hidden Room , is a 1949 British crime film directed by Edward Dmytryk, based on the 1947 book A Man About a Dog by Alec Coppel, who also wrote the screenplay for the film. Obsession was entered into the 1949 Cannes Film Festival.

sources.title: Obsession (restored, colorized) (1949, film-noir, imdb score: 7.4)
sources.description: Obsession , released in the USA as The Hidden Room , is a 1949 British crime film directed by Edward Dmytryk, based on the 1947 book A Man About a Dog by Alec Coppel, who also wrote the screenplay for the film. Obsession was entered into the 1949 Cannes Film Festival.

metadata.Plot: New Orleans businessman Michael Courtland's life is shattered when his wife and daughter are tragically killed in a botched kidnap rescue attempt. Many years later whilst visiting Italy he meets and falls in love with Sandra Portinari, who bears a striking resemblance to his wife.
metadata.Actors: Cliff Robertson, Geneviève Bujold, John Lithgow
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
